crumberry home about

about

offensive security operator and infrastructure hacker. i specialize in penetration testing, vulnerability research, and red team tooling — finding the gaps before the bad guys do.

my lab runs isolated KVM networks with vulnerable targets, C2 infrastructure, and automated exploitation pipelines. every assessment is methodical, every finding is documented, everything is reproducible.

when i'm not pwning boxes or writing CVEs, i'm building the next generation of security automation tooling — because good defenders need better tools than attackers do.

crumberry · 2026
